title: /delacc
text: /delacc Delete a Uniface Router or Uniface Server account on Windows platforms. /delacc AccountName Parameters AccountName —name of the account to be deleted. Description Use /delacc to delete an account. This is required if you want to change the password of an existing account; for example, if you want to change the password of the default urouter , UnifaceServer , or userver accounts. In this case, use /delacc to remove the account, and then recreate it with /newacc and /passwd . Related Links /newacc Create a new account on Windows platforms for the Uniface Router or Uniface Server. /passwd Creates a password for the newly created Uniface Server or Uniface Router account. Manually Creating and Deleting Uniface Router and Server Accounts If the installer was unable to create accounts for the Uniface Server and Uniface Router on Microsoft Windows, you can manually create these accounts.
